channel.title: Vome on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Vome on adoption curve dot net

item.title: Picturing privacy
item.description: Last night I spent a couple of hours talking in a group at a workshop organised by the VOME project - the broad topic was how how online services might handle issues of privacy and data protection, and how that aspect of our online lives could be better managed. That kicked off a train of thought that’s been latent for a while, and I ended up scribbling out an idea that I’ve wondered about on and off.
